positive: A mesmerizing stylized bioluminescent fox spirit in a seated, majestic posture, surrounded by geometric celestial flora and nebula patterns. The composition is highly centralized and symmetrical, designed for apparel print. Use a neo-traditional tattoo ink style mixed with Art Nouveau flowing lines. The color palette must be restricted to deep indigo, sapphire blue, ethereal gold, and vibrant cyan, emphasizing strong silhouettes and high contrast. The fox should have glowing markings and flowing magical energy trails. Include minimal, repeating patterns that frame the subject. Vector graphic quality, clean lines, sharp edges, perfect symmetry, high detail, studio lighting, highly intricate.
